arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola tipped for Man City exit as Arsenal sent clear Mikel Arteta warning
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has been told he could be the "best possible replacement" should Pep Guardiola leave Manchester City. Guardiola signed a new contract with City earlier this month, keeping him at the club until 2027, but Emmanuel Petit believes the Spaniard "looks tired".

arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal ready to move for €60million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly eyeing up a potential €60million transfer move for Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. The Gunners are in the market for a new striker at the moment, with a host of big names such as Alexander Isak and Benjamin Sesko under consideration at the Emirates Stadium. As well as that, it seems Arsenal are […] The post Revealed: Arsenal ready to move for €60million attacker transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's stuttering attack is costing Arteta the Premier League...again
arts.sum: Despite Arsenal being the second-highest scorers in the Premier League in the last two years, no player has netted more than Bukayo Saka ’s 16 goals from last season in any campaign under Arteta. Saka has continued to blossom as Arsenal’s focal point, not going more than two Premier League games without a goal contribution since in 11 months, whereas Kai Havertz and Gabriel Martinelli have both endured multiple barren runs in that time.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres has 'heart set on one club' as Arsenal sent clear transfer message
arts.sum: The report suggests that the Swede is set on a Premier League move and he believes that teaming up again with Amorim would be 'the best move' for his career, even if it means turning down Arsenal and Chelsea - two other clubs reportedly interested in him. The 26-year-old striker has been linked with a move to the Premier League for a while now as he continues to impress for Sporting CP on both the European and domestic stage .

arts.ttl: Saturday's Premier League Bet Builders: Isak can help Newcastle bounce back
arts.sum: The Premier League continues on Saturday and Joe Casey has picked out two Bet Builder selections for the day's action.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: West Ham make contact with Napoli over possible striker transfer
arts.sum: West Ham have reached out to Serie A club Napoli over a possible deal for Giovanni Simeone in the January transfer window, FootballTransfers has been told. Last year, the veteran attacker spoke about his meticulous planning for scoring goals, telling Sky Sports: "I study the goalkeepers a lot now because it is important for forwards to know the behaviour of goalkeepers when they shoot.
